channel.title: Fahim Final News Feed
channel.description: Curated important news from multiple sources

item.title: Ship carrying 34,000 tons of diesel from Malaysia arrives at Ctg Port

Importance: 93.5 | Covered by: 9 feeds | Reputation: 6.9

Matched titles:
- Ship carrying 34,000 tonnes of diesel from Malaysia arrives
- Vessel carrying 34,000 tonnes of diesel arrives at Ctg port
- Another vessel carrying 34,000 tonnes of diesel arrives at Ctg Port

- Vessel carrying 34,000 tonnes of diesel arrives at Ctg port
- Another vessel carrying 34,000 tonnes of diesel arrives in Bangladesh
- Ship carrying 34,000 tonnes of diesel from Malaysia arrives at Ctg Port
- Ship carrying 34,000 tonnes of diesel from Malaysia arrives at Ctg Port
- Another vessel carrying 34,000 tonnes of diesel reaches Ctg Port
- One more ship with 27,300 tonnes of diesel arrives at Ctg port
